story_title: Implement local blob storage with streaming SHA-256 hashing

questions.question: Do property-based tests verify streaming SHA-256 correctness?
questions.actionable_check: Search for tests that hash files with varying sizes and verify output matches Node.js crypto module expectations
questions.pass_criteria: Tests exist that hash files of varying sizes (small, medium, large) and verify hash matches expected SHA-256

questions.question: Are EXIF stripping failure scenarios tested?
questions.actionable_check: Search for tests that simulate EXIF stripping failures and verify error handling
questions.pass_criteria: Tests exist that simulate EXIF processing failures and verify graceful error handling

questions.question: Does the implementation avoid buffering entire files in memory?
questions.actionable_check: Review blob hashing code to verify it uses streaming APIs (createReadStream, pipe, streaming hash)
questions.pass_criteria: Hashing uses Node.js streams with no Buffer.from(entire file) calls

questions.question: Is the BlobStorageService properly integrated with database layer?
questions.actionable_check: Verify service uses getDatabase() pattern and accesses media_blobs table via Knex
questions.pass_criteria: Service follows existing patterns from ImageCacheService for database access

questions.question: Does deduplication prevent redundant blob storage?
questions.actionable_check: Search for tests that attach identical files and verify only one blob entry exists
questions.pass_criteria: Test exists that attaches same file twice and verifies single blob entry by hash

questions.question: Are metadata fields correctly populated for images vs non-images?
questions.actionable_check: Search for tests that verify dimensions_json and blurhash only populated for images
questions.pass_criteria: Tests verify images have dimensions+blurhash, non-images have null for these fields

questions.question: Are blob files stored with secure permissions (user-only read/write)?
questions.actionable_check: Review file creation code for mode: 0o600 and directory creation for mode: 0o700
questions.pass_criteria: All blob files created with mode 0o600, blob directory with mode 0o700

questions.question: Does the implementation satisfy AC-048 (streaming SHA-256)?
questions.actionable_check: Review hashing implementation to confirm no Buffer.concat or full-file reads
questions.pass_criteria: Hashing uses streaming with incremental updates, no full-file buffering

mandatory_questions.question: Is there any dead code introduced by this story?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Search for unused functions, classes, imports in src/main/blob-storage/
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: No unused code in story scope

mandatory_questions.question: Are there any duplicate implementations?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Check for similar logic to ImageCacheService that could be shared
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: No duplicate implementations; shared utilities extracted if appropriate

mandatory_questions.question: Do integration tests validate the story's workflow?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Verify integration test exists that exercises complete blob storage workflow (select file → hash → store → retrieve)
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: At least one integration test covers the happy path end-to-end
